case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. MARK CORLIS ET AL

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT CORLIS, MARK
